title: Crispy Pork Wraps
description: A delicious and crunchy twist on traditional wraps, filled with tender pork and savory flavors.
instructions: Preheat a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 350°F (180°C).
Cut the pork shoulder into thin strips and season with salt and pepper.
Heat the vegetable oil in the pan and fry the pork until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the pork from the oil and set aside.
Brush the wonton wraps with sesame oil and cook in the pan for 30 seconds on each side.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few pieces of fried pork onto each wrap, followed by a spoonful of hoisin sauce, a drizzle of soy sauce, and a sprinkle of green onions.
